problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Attention mechanism with linear complexity may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
